git_state.note: The entire wave-pick generator and most of src/ + all data/ is uncommitted.

scope_note: First /audit-project sweep targeted /home/pop_os/archive/gocold (a stale, parallel legacy folder). Operator redirected to the real project at /home/pop_os/archive/rolodex/gocold-wms-flow via dims.ods. This report is scoped to the real project; legacy folder findings retained as an appendix (L1-L3).
definition_of_done: Wave pick generator pulls AWAITING_PICK_AND_PACK SOs and emits operator-ready PDF/CSV sheets under data/processed/waves/<ts>/ (no CC mutation).
CartonCloud client is read-only (write_enabled=False default); never POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE except read-via-POST search. Non-negotiable: SAP-B1 writes could collide.
Carton dimensions captured for the active Forage SKU set (target 438-460) to unblock slotting + cartonisation.
No stub/placeholder code; Australian English; src/ layout; .env-only secrets.
(dim-capture-app sub-project) dims synced into CartonCloud via PATCH /products.

modules_claimed.name: dim-capture-app/01 backend-core
modules_claimed.verified_actual: scaffold only — routes return 501, no migrations, no .env, no passing tests; its own STATE.md says 'Not started'

findings.title: Dims→CartonCloud sync not built
findings.evidence: ~409 SKUs have dims in data/dims/dims_2026-05-13.xlsx but 0 in CC. dim_loader.py reads local-only, no CC write. Sync requires dim-capture-app modules 02 (cc-client PATCH /products) + 04 (dim-api); both 🔲 not started, routes return 501 (dim-capture-app/backend/src/routes/sync.ts:5, dims.ts:5).
findings.constraint: CLAUDE.md: dims-in-CC needed for CC-native wave/cartonisation; safety rule = no auto-write to CC.

findings.title: CLAUDE.md dims line stale
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md:76 says '0 / 460 SKUs have carton dimensions in CC — primary blocker' (dated 10 May). Dims captured 12 May (27%→100% jump). Should read ~409 captured locally, 0 synced to CC.

findings.title: dim-capture-app module-01 icon overstates reality
findings.evidence: dim-capture-app/MODULES.md marks 01 backend-core 🟨 in-progress, but modules/backend-core/STATE.md says 'Not started' and code is scaffold-only (all routes return 501, no Prisma migration, no .env, vitest present but no implementations).
findings.constraint: Framework rule: a module is not done without passing smoke + STATE.md current; icons must not lie.

findings.title: Working wave generator is uncommitted
findings.evidence: git: 2 commits total, 27 untracked paths. wave_picks.py, generate_waves.py, src/output/, src/locations/, most of src/analysis/, all data/ are untracked. A reset/rm loses production-ready work.
findings.constraint: House style: complete, production-ready code — but it is not under version control.

findings.title: No tests — read-only guard unguarded by regression
findings.evidence: tests/ is empty. The write_enabled gate (cc_client/client.py:139) and wave consolidation are validated only by real-data runs. The read-only guard is the project non-negotiable and has no test.
findings.constraint: CLAUDE.md non-negotiable: read-only CC. An unenforced-by-test non-negotiable is the highest-value missing test.

findings.title: Dim weight capture incomplete
findings.evidence: dims_2026-05-13.xlsx: outer weight 281/409 (69%); inner-pack-qty 407/409 (99.5%, 2 blank). L/W/H 100%.

findings.title: [legacy] Duplicate/blank each-barcodes in archive/gocold sheets
findings.evidence: archive/gocold/FINAL EACH BARCODE.ods: 5 barcodes each map to 2 distinct SKUs (15060489730043/0203/0654/0739 Dash single vs doublepack; 19358794000095 Barbell sea-salt variants) + 34 blank of 422. Verified by direct ODS parse. Risk is real ONLY if these were loaded into CC's product master (scan ambiguity at bench). Wave generator picks by SKU/location, not barcode — not blocked.
findings.constraint: Spec: each barcode must resolve to exactly one product.
findings.maps_to_module: barcode dedup (legacy, if sheets are live in CC)

findings.title: [legacy] Plaintext SMTP password
findings.evidence: archive/gocold/pdf_to_cartoncloud_sales/.env:5 holds a Gmail app password. Not git-tracked (local only, not published). Rotate + add .gitignore if module is still used.

findings.title: [legacy] Inbound-API vs sales-email-CSV path
findings.evidence: archive/gocold inbound module = real CC REST API but dormant (no .env, stale PO 2777.pdf in inbox since Jan 14). sales module = CSV-over-email, ran Mar 9. If either is still live, pick a go-forward path.

gate_readiness.note: gocold-wms-flow root is a scripts+notebooks repo with no module registry, so compile-stress/deploy-local do not apply to the wave pipeline. dim-capture-app is framework-managed and deploy-local is BLOCKED (.deploy-state local_validated:false; ~1/8 modules scaffolded).

verdict: Wave pick generator is real, complete, ran for real, and enforces the read-only non-negotiable. The 0/460-dims blocker is effectively resolved locally (~409 captured). The only real remaining build is dims→CC sync via dim-capture-app (~1/8 built). Biggest immediate risk is non-technical: the working generator is uncommitted.
